---
title: "#omicidx"
format: gfm
---

## 2020-03-10

**Sean Davis** (20:41:02):
> @Sean Davis has joined the channel

**Sean Davis** (20:41:02):
> set the channel description: [https://omicidx.cancerdatasci.org/](https://omicidx.cancerdatasci.org/)

**Sean Davis** (20:41:59):
> @Sean Davis has left the channel


## 2020-06-06

**Olagunju Abdulrahman** (19:58:37):
> @Olagunju Abdulrahman has joined the channel


## 2020-12-02

**Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles)** (05:43:10):
> @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has joined the channel

**Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles)** (05:43:12):
> @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has left the channel


## 2021-01-22

**Annajiat Alim Rasel** (15:44:50):
> @Annajiat Alim Rasel has joined the channel


## 2021-03-20

**watanabe_st** (01:57:52):
> @watanabe_st has joined the channel


## 2021-05-11

**Megha Lal** (16:45:18):
> @Megha Lal has joined the channel


## 2021-05-18

**Roy Storey** (01:01:54):
> @Roy Storey has joined the channel


## 2022-01-28

**Megha Lal** (11:13:54):
> @Megha Lal has left the channel


## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:09:38):
> archived the channel
